summary: Frontend testing of MiraLoveNote component on Shop and Services pages. All features working correctly - emotional breed-specific messages displayed with proper styling.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraLoveNote component properly implements hero variant with sparkle avatar, message bubble, and 'Mira knows {petName}' footer
Component correctly uses data-testid='mira-love-note' for testing
Breed-specific messages for Shih Tzu working: 'royal Shih Tzu attitude', 'silky coat deserves nothing but the finest care'
Animation with transition-all duration-700 for smooth appearance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user test@example.com has pet TestMeister (Shih Tzu). MiraLoveNote shows emotional breed-specific messages on both Shop and Services pages.
